scripts.build: tsc -b && npm run build -w @notifyhub/widget && npm run build -w @notifyhub/demo-host && npm run build -w @notifyhub/dashboard
scripts.test: vitest run && vitest run --config vitest.widget.config.ts && npm test -w @notifyhub/demo-host && npm test -w @notifyhub/dashboard
scripts.test:kill: npm run build && vitest run --config vitest.reliability.config.ts
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b --pretty false && npm run typecheck -w @notifyhub/widget && npm run build -w @notifyhub/widget && npm run typecheck -w @notifyhub/demo-host && npm run typecheck -w @notifyhub/dashboard
scripts.verify: npm run clean && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run smoke -w @notifyhub/demo-host && npm run smoke -w @notifyhub/dashboard && npm test
